goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'moderate' price range and should 'include free parking'.
The hotel should have 'a star of 3'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for '7 people' and '5 nights' starting from 'thursday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should be in the 'same price range as the hotel' and should serve 'italian' food.
Make sure you get 'area' and 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the moderate price range and should include free parking
The hotel should have a star of 3
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 7 people and 5 nights starting from thursday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the same price range as the hotel and should serve italian food
Make sure you get area and postcode
